2026-0255
2026-03-25ISEDCompetition Tribunal ActReappointment of a member of the Competition TribunalRe-appointment of Stephen Law of Sackville, New Brunswick, as a member of the Competition Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years, effective April 15, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Competition Tribunal
precis: Re-appointment of Stephen Law of Sackville, New Brunswick, as a member of the Competition Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years, effective April 15, 2026.
